hero.title: Local-First Peer-to-Peer Software
hero.subtitle: No servers. No accounts. No passwords. Your data lives on your device, collaboration happens directly between browsers — relay infrastructure starts on demand and stops when you're done.

stack.title: The Local-First Stack
stack.sub: Every layer works without a central service — and every layer is an open-source building block you can use on its own.

identity.name: Identity
identity.desc: WebAuthn / Passkeys / DIDs — your keys, your browser, no extensions

data.name: Data
data.desc: OrbitDB — your data on your device, replicated peer-to-peer

sync.name: Sync
sync.desc: libp2p — direct browser-to-browser connections across NATs

infra.name: Infrastructure
infra.desc: Relay Button — on-demand relays on decentralized compute, sponsorable by anyone

archive.name: Archive
archive.desc: Storacha / Filecoin — durable backups that outlive devices

projects.title: Projects
projects.sub: Working software, not slideware — each project is a building block of the stack with demo, source, and packages.
